query: SELECT id, title, category, event_date FROM timeline_events WHERE category IN ('state_case', 'federal_case', 'motion', 'competency', 'warrant', 'custody') ORDER BY event_date LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute SELECT id, title, category, event_date FROM timeline_events WHERE category IN ('state_case', 'federal_case', 'motion', 'competency', 'warrant', 'custody') ORDER BY event_date LIMIT 30;

rows.title: Declaration of probable cause and arrest
Early case assignment request filed
Original criminal complaint filed (Reno Justice Court)

Trial continued — stand-in counsel requests vacation of trial date
Pro se motion to dismiss and request for new counsel filed
Order striking defendant's pro se motion to dismiss

Order granting motion to strike pro se sanctions filing
Pro se motion for leave to file pro se motions

Young hearing — competency evaluation ordered; proceedings stayed
Competency order entered nunc pro tunc to December 5

OSC hearing — pretrial release revoked; no-bail bench warrant issued
Bench warrant and extradition order materials
Federal Civil Rights Complaint Filed (ECF 5)
Emergency Motion for Temporary Restraining Order Filed (ECF 9)
State files motion for contempt over pro se filings
